title: Virtual interface & clocking block leads to internal error

features.name: clocking block reference through virtual interface in class
features.description: Code should include a class with a virtual interface member that is used to reference a clocking block in a clocking event expression

features.name: interface with clocking block definition
features.description: Code should include an interface that defines a clocking block with a clocking event

features.name: virtual interface assignment from interface instance
features.description: Code should include a class virtual interface being assigned from a module interface instance
